name: cover-letter-generator
title: Cover Letter Generator
description: This extension help create cover letter for job application instantly based on the job discription from the selection using Gemini API
author: sunny_george

commands.name: cover-letter-maker
commands.title: Cover Letter Maker
commands.description: Generates a cover letter based on the job description in the selected text.

commands.name: cover-letter-history
commands.title: Cover Letter History
commands.description: Provide a comprehensive historical timeline of the generated cover letter.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
